# Hydrochlorothiazide 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Hydrochlorothiazide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Hydrochlorothiazide</strong> 目前有 <strong>19 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Hydrochlorothiazide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of essential hypertension. PritorPlus fixed-dose combination (40 mg telmisartan / 12.5 mg hydrochlorothiazide, 80mg telmisartan / 12.5 mg hydrochlorothiazide) is indicated in patients whose...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>malignant hypertensive renal disease（98.4%）</li>
<li>malignant renovascular hypertension（98.4%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension owing to lung disease and/or hypoxia（98.3%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension with unclear multifactorial mechanism（98.3%）</li>
<li>hypertensive disorder（98.3%）</li>
<li>Braddock syndrome（97.9%）</li>
<li>chronic pulmonary heart disease（97.8%）</li>
<li>congestive heart failure（93.7%）</li>
<li>acute pulmonary heart disease（93.2%）</li>
<li>primary hereditary glaucoma（90.9%）</li>
<li>open-angle glaucoma（86.2%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（74.5%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（72.8%）</li>
<li>distal myopathy, Tateyama type（70.5%）</li>
<li>chronic kidney disease（69.8%）</li>
<li>hypertrophic cardiomyopathy due to intensive athletic training（67.5%）</li>
<li>hypertrophic cardiomyopathy（66.8%）</li>
<li>end stage renal failure（65.9%）</li>
<li>cirrhotic cardiomyopathy（65.2%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（65.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/hydrochlorothiazide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
